overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character navigating from an indoor industrial storage facility through a rainy night-time urban environment, emerging from a canal system to a neon-lit street level with passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage basement with metal shelving units

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit industrial storage room with metal shelving units and concrete pillars

entered.detail: painted yellow safety railing along the walkway
tall metal shelving with boxes and supplies

segments.scene_description: The segment takes place in a dimly lit indoor industrial storage facility. The camera moves forward through a narrow corridor with yellow metal railings on the left and metal shelving units on the right. Concrete pillars support the ceiling with fluorescent lighting overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading from indoor storage to outdoor industrial canal

events.description: exits the indoor storage facility through a metal gate into the outdoor industrial area

agents.ego_description: passing through a metal gate doorway from the storage room into an outdoor industrial canal system

entered.detail: large metal gate marking the exit from the building
massive industrial drainage pipes running along the canal
distant illuminated skyscrapers visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a transition zone exiting the storage facility through metal gates. The environment shifts from enclosed indoor to semi-covered outdoor, revealing large industrial concrete pipes and a distant city skyline against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial canal walkway with large drainage pipes and overhead bridge structures

events.description: emerging from covered area into open night with ambient city lights becoming visible

agents.ego_description: navigating a narrow concrete walkway alongside large industrial pipes with the city skyline visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall concrete walls enclosing the industrial canal
large concrete bridge structure spanning the canal

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow concrete canal walkway flanked by massive industrial pipes and concrete walls. The scene is open to the night sky with distant city towers visible. An industrial bridge structure looms ahead as the character progresses along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete ramp ascending from canal to street level with palm trees and neon signage

events.description: reaches the top of the ramp transitioning from industrial canal to commercial street level

agents.ego_description: climbing a steep concrete ramp from the canal level up to the street, passing palm trees and approaching neon-lit buildings

entered.detail: steep concrete slope leading up from the canal
tall palm trees lining the upper street level
large circular neon sign with Japanese text for Kiroshi corporation
large illuminated advertising screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep concrete ramp from the industrial canal toward street level. Palm trees become visible against the night sky along with bright neon signage including a prominent Kiroshi corporation sign. The environment transitions from industrial infrastructure to commercial urban streetscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with neon advertisements and moderate traffic

events.description: vehicle drives past on the wet asphalt road
another car passes by on the road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk of a neon-lit city street with palm trees and futuristic buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the wet road surface

entered.detail: wet asphalt city street with yellow lane markings
concrete divider separating sidewalk from road
futuristic cars driving on the road
tall commercial buildings with illuminated facades

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic city street at night, with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings. Palm trees line the sidewalk and futuristic vehicles drive past on the road. The scene features prominent neon signage and a dense urban skyline with overpass structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit industrial interior into a vibrant, neon-soaked urban streetscape at night. It begins by moving through a narrow storage corridor flanked by yellow railings and metal shelving under flickering fluorescent lights. As the camera passes through metal gates, the enclosed space opens into a semi-covered transition zone of concrete pipes and a distant city skyline before proceeding along a narrow canal walkway beneath a dark sky. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a steep concrete ramp, leaving the industrial infrastructure behind and emerging toward bright neon signage and palm trees. Finally, the movement settles onto a futuristic city street where wet asphalt reflects the glow of corporate signs and passing vehicles glide through a dense urban environment.
